content: ESLint CLI table stakes: exit code 0 (success/no errors), 1 (linting errors or warnings exceed --max-warnings), 2 (fatal parse errors with --exit-on-fatal-error). File glob patterns, --ignore-pattern, .eslintignore, --fix mode, --format for output formatters (built-in + custom), --output-file. --fix cannot be used with --stdin. Plugin system, sharable configs, JS config file format.
